_comment: Source of truth for the site roadmap (docs/roadmap.html) and the README '## Roadmap' block. Edit this, then run `python3 scripts/site-release.py`. Columns render top to bottom; empty columns are skipped. Item fields: title (req), type (feat|fix|infra), issue (GitHub #, links to vote), note, version (for shipped — links to the changelog). Voting happens on GitHub issues (upvote) — keep this curated and honest; it's a guide, not a promise.

items.title: One-click “Update with Homebrew”
items.note: An Update button in the update prompt that runs `brew upgrade` and relaunches — the interim before signed auto-update.

items.title: Signed & notarized macOS builds
items.note: A Developer ID signature so Gatekeeper trusts Burrow without the right-click → Open dance.

items.title: In-app auto-update
items.note: Once builds are signed, silent background update checks with a one-click install (Sparkle).

items.title: Bundle a pinned `mo` engine in every release
items.note: Engine included in the download, so there's no separate install step on any install path.

items.title: Windows preview → first stable
items.note: Data-loss and supply-chain hardening, parity, and test coverage before it loses the “preview” label.

columns.title: Considering
columns.blurb: Weighing it — upvote to push it up.

items.title: Persistent one-tap “run all” Tune-Up
items.note: A saved Smart-Care routine you trigger in one tap from the dashboard.
